brief.name: HUSH
brief.industry: AI-powered ambient sound and meditation iOS app, $9.99/mo subscription
brief.audience: Adults aged 25-45 in high-stress urban jobs — tech workers, lawyers, designers, founders. Sleep poorly, have tried Calm and Headspace but found them too gamified. Value calm over completion.
brief.tone: calm, weightless, considered, gentle, reverent, optimistic-soft, premium-quiet
brief.references: visionOS interface design, macOS Sonoma control center, Linear's marketing site, the Loftie alarm clock UI, Apple Music's design language, Korean app design (Toss, Kakao)
brief.context: Hero must include the tagline "Sound for nervous systems" alongside a floating, breathing animated orb. Sections: Hero, Features (4 cards — Adaptive Ambient Mix / Sleep Stories Without Voices / Breath Companion / Listen Offline), How It Works (3 stops: Listen → Notice → Drift), Pricing (single tier $9.99/mo, $79/yr, 14-day trial), App Store CTAs (Download for iPhone, also Apple Watch and Mac), Footer.
brief.avoid: Anything stress-inducing. Streaks, badges, gamification. "Unlock your potential" copy. Wellness-industry vagueness. Saturated colors. Hard shadows. Sharp corners. Anything that looks like Headspace.
